strategy: Five-boss team challenge (Zeus, Apollo, Ares, Poseidon, Hades). Kill Apollo Bright One first — if any other boss dies before him, he revives all fallen bosses with Eternal Leviathan.
Hit Zeus with Storm or Death (+35%); avoid Myth (80%). Adapt your school for each of the other bosses.

Mind the setup punishes: a Trap triggers Ares' Efreet (1,000) on the caster, a Blade triggers Poseidon's Shift Atlantean (Enfeeble + 360), an Aura/Shadow spell triggers Poseidon's Tower Shield, a self-heal triggers Hades' Shift Wraith + Infection, and a single-target spell can trigger Zeus' stunning Shift Minotaur. Use Aegis on blades and favor multi-target spells.

Exploit the gifts: a Damage spell makes Ares hand you a +30% Dark Pact blade, an All-Enemies spell makes Zeus heal you, an AoE heal makes Apollo give you Guiding Light, and any kill gives +3 pips from Hades — so AoE-based play buffs and sustains your team.

Once Zeus dies, every other boss starts firing natural attacks on a timer and the pairing cycles (Earthquake combos every 5th/10th round that strip charms/wards and hit all wizards) ramp up — so burst the remaining bosses fast after Apollo and Zeus are down.
Healer uses AoE heals over single-target self-heals, supports AoE to farm pips and blades, hitter closes each boss.
cheatNotes: Put a Dispel on any enemy and Zeus Cleanse Charms it off — dispels won't stick.
Cast an All-Enemies spell and Zeus heals YOU with Healing Current (325) — a free heal, so favor AoE.
Once another boss dies, Zeus fires his Earthquake natural attack every two rounds.
A single-target spell may trigger Zeus' Shift Minotaur (310 Myth + one-round stun) on the caster — favor AoE.
Every 5th round Zeus casts Wrath of Zeus (995 Storm to all) plus Astraphobia — shield the team.
If any boss dies before Apollo, he revives all fallen bosses — kill Apollo first.
An All-Enemies heal makes Apollo give you a Guiding Light — use AoE heals.
Place a Trap on any enemy and Ares Efreets the caster for 1,000 — use Aegis/timing or AoE traps.
Once Apollo and Zeus are dead, Quench prevents that Efreet.
All-enemies spells (Windstorm) don't trigger the Efreet.
Cast a Damage spell and Ares gives you a +30% Dark Pact blade — a free blade to exploit.
Once Zeus is dead, Ares natural-attacks at the start of every round.
Cast a Blade and Poseidon Shift Atlanteans the receiver (Enfeeble + 360 Storm) — protect with Aegis.
Aegis stops the charm from being removed.
Bladestorm only affects the caster.
Cast an Aura or Shadow spell and Poseidon Tower Shields the caster.
Once Zeus is dead, Poseidon Tempests every three rounds.
Heal yourself and Hades Shift Wraiths you (335 Death + -90% Infection) — heal others via AoE instead.
A single-target heal on another player won't trigger it.
AoE heals trigger it.
Pet heals trigger it.
Whoever lands a kill gets +3 pips from Hades' Donate Power — use it to fuel your hitter.
Once Zeus is dead, Hades natural-attacks a random wizard every two rounds.
Every 10th round Zeus uses his Earthquake natural attack.
Ares follows it with his own natural attack.
Every 5th round Zeus Earthquakes for 630 Myth to all and strips charms and wards — rebuild after.
He follows it with his Lernaean Hydra natural attack.
Every 5th round Zeus Earthquakes for 630 Myth to all, stripping charms and wards.
Poseidon may follow with Tempest (960 Storm, steals a pip each).
Poseidon uses Snow Shark (650 Ice to all wizards).
Apollo follows with his natural attack the same turn.
Every 5th round Poseidon uses Snow Shark.
Hades follows with Lycian Chimera (590 Death to all + -45% Virulent Plague).
Every 10th round Poseidon Snow Sharks for 650 Ice to all.
Hades follows with Lernaean Hydra (795 Storm + Black Mantle to all).
On the first round Hades casts his 4-part DoT natural attack before Poseidon.
Every first round Hades natural-attacks for 4 Death plus a heavy delayed DoT — clear it with Triage.
Ares follows with his natural attack.
Every first round Ares casts a Wrath of Ares (705 Fire to all) and Detonates one DoT from each wizard.
Apollo follows with a natural attack (30 + 780 Fire over 3 rounds to all) and heals all bosses 525.
